subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whose letter came before the Wronged One when He was in the hands of the heedless. O Khayrullah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر کتابه لدی المظلوم اذ کان بین ایدی الغافلین یا خیرالله قد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
